LOOKFAR.GroupLevelHint: Set the group level for generating dangers.
LOOKFAR.TreasureHunterHint: Modify the chance of discovery based on the level of Treasure Hunter skill.
LOOKFAR.WellTraveledHint: Check this if the party has the Well-Traveled trait, reducing travel roll difficulty.
LOOKFAR.CharacterMessageHint: Enter text that will display whenever the Travel Roll is affected by your group's Wayfarer.
LOOKFAR.MinorDiscoveriesHint: When enabled, travel rolls may result in minor discoveries (finds without effects).
LOOKFAR.DiscoveryEffectRollTableHint: Select the Roll Table to use for generating discovery effects.
LOOKFAR.DiscoveryKeywordsRollTableHint: Select the Roll Table to use for generating discovery keywords.
LOOKFAR.DangerSourceRollTableHint: Select the Roll Table to use for generating danger sources.
LOOKFAR.KeepOrReroll: Do you want to keep this result or reroll?
LOOKFAR.TravelDayPassedWithoutIncident: The travel day passed without incident.
LOOKFAR.DangerSourceRollTableHint: Select the Roll Table to use for generating danger sources.
LOOKFAR.ThreatsDataNotLoaded: Threats data is not fully loaded.
LOOKFAR.DangerSourceTableNotFound: Selected Danger Source Roll Table not found. Falling back to defaults.
LOOKFAR.NoSourceDataInDangers: No source data available in dangers.json.
LOOKFAR.NoEffectsDataInDiscovery: No effects data available in discovery.json.
LOOKFAR.DiscoveryKeywordsTableNotFound: Selected Discovery Keywords Roll Table not found. Falling back to defaults.
LOOKFAR.TravelDayPassedWithoutIncident: The travel day passed without incident.
